description_wiki: Mexico, officially the United Mexican States, is a country in North America.

description: city and county seat of Cook County, and largest city in State of Illinois, United States of America
description_wiki: Chicago is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Illinois and in the Midwestern United States.

description: municipal seat of Uriangato, State of Guanajuato, Mexico
description_wiki: Uriangato is a city and one of  46 municipalities of Guanajuato, located just north of the border between the states of Guanajuato and Michoacán in west central Mexico.

description: municipal seat of Celaya, State of Guanajuato, Mexico
description_wiki: Celaya (Spanish pronunciation: [seˈlaja] ; Otomi: Ndathi) is a city and its surrounding municipality in the state of Guanajuato, Mexico, located in the southeast quadrant of the state.
Guanajuato, officially the Free and Sovereign State of Guanajuato, is one of the 32 states that make up the Federal Entities of Mexico.

description: municipal seat of Iturbide, State of Guanajuato, Mexico
description_wiki: San José Iturbide is a Mexican city (and municipality) located in the Northeast region of the state of Guanajuato, within the Sierra Gorda range.

description: municipal seat of Juárez, State of Chihuahua, Mexico
description_wiki: Ciudad Juárez (US:  sew-DAHD HWAR-ez; Spanish: [sjuˈðað ˈxwaɾes] ; "Juárez City"), commonly referred to as just Juárez (Lipan: Tsé Táhú'ayá), is the most populous city in the Mexican state of Chihuahua.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Missouri (see pronunciation) is a landlocked state in the Midwestern region of the United States.
New Albany is a city in the U.S. state of Ohio.
